title: Samsung Galaxy A37 box leaks
description: The Samsung Galaxy A37 has been leaking a lot lately alongside the A57, which presumably it's going to be launching together with. That launch can't come soon enough - only in the past few days we've seen the umpteenth render leak showing them both, as well as hands-on videos. Today it's time for something different: a picture showing the retail box for the Galaxy A37. Here it is in all its glory, courtesy of a tip we received from someone working at a phone shop somewhere in the UK. Speaking of said shop, the A37 is apparently in stock and ready to go, while the A57 is confirmed to...

title: Xiaomi India will introduce the Redmi 15A next week
description: So, that’s what the “hero” teaser was about – Xiaomi is bringing back its affordable Redmi A-series next week. The last one was the Redmi 10A from early 2022. Note that this is different from the likes of the Redmi A5, which is an Android Go Edition phone. The Redmi 10A ran full-fat Android. Xiaomi Redmi 15A: 5G chipset with an octa-core CPU • dual-camera The Redmi 15A will become the first 5G-capable phone in its family. Details are a bit scarce, but here are a few other specs to look forward to. For reference, the 10A launched at ₹8,500 four years ago. The 15A will have the...

title: OnePlus Watch 4 specs leak, might come in two variants
description: With the OnePlus Watch 3 released just a little over a year ago, it's about time for the Watch 4 to come around. And seeing that the device's certification has already popped up on EMVCo's website, launch is likely imminent. In addition to the certification, which isn't all that revealing, Sudhanshu Ambhore on X unearthed some of the key specs that were not disclosed in the document. We are looking at the same Snapdragon W5 Gen 1 chipset from last year, a 1.5-inch LTPO AMOLED screen with 466 x 466px resolution and a 646 mAh battery. The size also remains unchanged at 47mm, but the...

title: Huawei Mate 80 Pro Max Wind Edition announced with a built-in cooling fan
description: Huawei has introduced a new variant of its recently launched Mate 80 Pro Max, featuring a built-in cooling fan. Dubbed the Mate 80 Pro Max Wind Edition, the device is currently up for pre-order in China. Huawei has yet to share any details about the new variant, suggesting a formal announcement could be imminent, likely alongside the Huawei Enjoy 90 series, which is set to debut in China on March 23. The Mate 80 Pro Max Wind Edition appears largely identical to the standard model at first glance, but teaser images reveal a wider camera ring with visible vents for the built-in...

title: Oppo K14 5G goes on open sale
description: Following its delayed launch, Oppo has now officially unveiled its latest K-series phone in India– the Oppo K14 5G. If it looks familiar, that’s because this is a rebadged Oppo A6, which launched back in January. Oppo K14 5G key specs Oppo K14 5G comes in Prism Violet, Prism White and Icy Blue colors. It starts at INR 17,999 ($192) for the 6/128GB trim. The 8/256GB model will go for INR 21,999 ($235). K14 5G is available directly from Oppo India’s online store as well as partnering retailers. Oppo K14 5G is built around a 6.75-inch IPS LCD (HD+120Hz) and comes equipped...

title: OnePlus 15T's cameras detailed ahead of launch
description: The OnePlus 15T will debut in China on March 24. Ahead of the launch, OnePlus has been gradually revealing key details about the device, with the latest teaser now confirming its camera specifications. OnePlus revealed in a Weibo post that the upcoming handset will get a dual 50MP rear camera setup. The primary camera will be a 50MP 1/1.56-inch Sony sensor with a 24mm focal length and optical image stabilization (OIS). There’s also a 50MP periscope telephoto camera that offers 3.5x optical zoom, OIS, and 7x lossless zoom. The OnePlus 15T will also come with the LUMO imaging...

title: New images of Samsung's Galaxy A57 and Galaxy A37 emerge
description: The Samsung Galaxy A57 and Galaxy A37 have been widely leaked, but their launch date still remains under wraps. Most recently, a TikTok user from Thailand shared hands-on videos of both devices. Now, a fresh set of images has emerged, offering another look at the upcoming phones. Prominent leakster Evleaks has shared official looking renders of Samsung’s upcoming Galaxy A57 and Galaxy A37. Let’s start with the Galaxy A57, which is expected to be available in Charcoal, Icy Blue, Lilac, and Navy colour options. The device is said to feature a premium design along with a triple rear...

title: Samsung ups R&D investment to lead the AI race
description: According to a new report from Reuters today, Samsung Electronics plans to invest KRW 110 trillion, or approximately $73 billion, in research and development and facilities "in a bid to lead the semiconductor industry in artificial intelligence". In a corporate filing, Samsung also revealed that it is pursuing "meaningful mergers and acquisitions" in areas like robotics, medical technology, automotive electronics, and air conditioning solutions. To put the number in perspective, Samsung says it invested a total of KRW 90.4 trillion, or approximately $60 billion, in R&D last year. So...

title: Instagram Reels can now be paused with a single tap
description: Instagram has introduced a new feature aimed at making it easier to interact with Reels. The feature is available on the web and is also rolling out to both Android and iOS apps with the latest update. The Meta-owned platform announced the feature via a post on Threads. With the update, users can now pause Reels with a simple tap. Previously, tapping a Reel would mute the audio instead. Previously, pausing a Reel required a tap-and-hold gesture. With the update, a single tap now pauses playback, and the mute option appears once the Reel is paused. Back in December 2025, Instagram...

title: Spanish fashion brand designs a handbag for the Galaxy S26 Ultra and Buds 4 Pro
description: Samsung partnered with Spanish fashion brand DOMINNICO to create a limited-edition luxury handbag with a design inspired by the newly released Galaxy S26 Ultra and the Galaxy Buds 4 Pro. The handbag is called Samsung X DOMINNICO, and it's already up for pre-order, priced at €420. Samsung X DOMINNICO leather handbag The handbag is made of leather, and it's also handcrafted, featuring a baguette silhouette. It comes only in a specific off-white color with metallic closures and accents. Perhaps more importantly, the handbag has two dedicated compartments specifically designed to...

title: vivo shows a Godfather-style video recorded on the X300 Ultra as the X300s runs Geekbench
description: Earlier today vivo revealed that the X300 Ultra and X300s will be fully unveiled on March 30. Ahead of that, the company is teasing the former with an interesting video, made in the style of the Godfather movies. The video, which you can see below, was entirely shot on the X300 Ultra. During the video, it's revealed that the phone can do 4K video recording at 120fps across all focal lengths with Log support. The X300 Ultra comes with new Film Style and Film Look styles which, as the names imply, are designed to replicate classic cinema aesthetics. These were used in the shooting of...

title: Redmi starts teasing "a new hero" that's coming soon
description: Redmi is getting ready to unveil a new smartphone in India, and it's started the teaser campaign for it today through its official X account. As you can see, not much is revealed in the quick teaser video below, just that "hero mode" is loading and the letter R is featured quite prominently. A new hero loading...#StayTuned pic.twitter.com/l8a83asiR5— Redmi India (@RedmiIndia) March 19, 2026 That may mean this device will have that letter in its name - Redmi 17R, perhaps? - or not. After all, Redmi starts with an R too. Hopefully the brand will reveal more details about this...

title: OnePlus Nord 6 retail box leak reveals key specifications
description: OnePlus recently began teasing the launch of the Nord 6 mid-range smartphone in India. While the device is rumored to debut in early April, several details have already surfaced online. The latest leak now sheds more light on the upcoming handset. A tipster has shared an image of the OnePlus Nord 6’s retail box, revealing several key specifications of the upcoming device. According to the leak, the phone will be powered by a Snapdragon 8-series chipset, likely the Snapdragon 8s Gen 4. It will sport a 6.78-inch AMOLED display with a 1.5K resolution and a 165Hz refresh rate. The...

title: Fortnite returns to Google Play worldwide
description: After five and a half years of legal battles, Fortnite is finally making its triumphant return to Google Play worldwide. The hit battle royale title is once again available on Google Play as a free download just in time for its new Battle Royale Season: Fortnite Showdown. This latest development follows Fortnite’s return to the US version of Google Play back in December and its relisting on the Apple App Store last May. Fortnite was removed from Google Play and the App Store back in August 2020, shortly after Epic tried to implement its own external payment system for in-game...

title: Nothing Phone (4a) Pro in for review
description: The Nothing Phone (4a) lineup is complete in our office! We now have both units side-by-side, so we can better show you the nuanced differences. The Phone (4a) Pro stands out from its vanilla counterpart on looks alone, and it becomes more impressive when you hold it. The flashiest comparison revolves around the Glyph interface - it's a simple Glyph bar on the non-Pro and a full-on circular dot matrix display on the Pro. Getting technical for a bit, the Pro has 137 LEDs, while the regular has just 63. As you can imagine, you can do all sorts of clever stuff with the Glyph Matrix on the...

title: OnePlus Nord Buds 4 Pro debuts with ANC, up to 54 hours of battery life
description: OnePlus has launched the Nord Buds 4 Pro TWS earbuds in India. The new earbuds come with active noise cancellation (ANC), 12mm titanium-coated dynamic drivers, and are claimed to deliver up to 54 hours of total playback with the charging case. The Nord Buds 4 Pro supports up to 55dB ANC and features LHDC 5.0 Hi-Res audio codec. They also offer Bluetooth 6.0 connectivity with dual-device pairing, along with Google Fast Pair support. As mentioned, the earbuds are equipped with 12mm titanium-coated dynamic drivers, which OnePlus claims can deliver up to twice the power output of the...

title: Realme P4 Lite 5G arrives with familiar specs
description: The latest smartphone with a 7,000 mAh battery from Realme is now official as the Realme P4 Lite 5G was just introduced in India. While new in name, this is actually just a rebrand of the recently announced Realme C83, which made its debut earlier this month. The two devices share identical specs, but the P4 Lite 5G opts for a slightly altered back design incorporating a mosaic look. Realme P4 Lite 5G in Mosaic Green and Mosaic Blue Realme P4 Lite 5G comes in Mosaic Green and Mosaic Blue colors and starts at INR 12,999 ($140) for the baseline 4/64GB trim. You can also opt for the...

title: iQOO Z11 with 9,020mAh battery to be unveiled on March 26
description: The iQOO Z11 now has a confirmed launch date in China, where it will debut alongside the Z11x 5G, which made its India debut last week. iQOO has finally confirmed the launch date for the Z11 and Z11x via a post on Weibo. Both phones are set to go official on March 26 and will be available for purchase the same day. As per recent teasers, the iQOO Z11 will come with a 9,020mAh battery and a 165Hz display. The phone is rumored to be equipped with a MediaTek Dimensity 8500 SoC. On the other hand, the Z11x will be identical to the variant launched in India. It features a...

title: vivo X300 Ultra, vivo X300s launch date and design officially revealed
description: vivo has finally confirmed the launch date for its flagship camera-focused smartphone, the X300 Ultra, following weeks of teasers and its showcase at MWC 2026. The company has also unveiled the phone’s rear design. In addition, vivo offered a first look at the X300s, which is set to debut alongside the Ultra. In a post on Weibo, vivo revealed that the X300 Ultra and the X300s would debut in China on March 30. Alongside the announcement, vivo Product Manager Han Boxiao shared a first look at the rear panels of both devices. The vivo X300 Ultra and X300s are shown in a new ‘Film...

title: OnePlus 15T's magnetic accessories revealed in official images
description: After confirming the OnePlus 15T’s launch date in China, the company has now shared official images showcasing a range of magnetic accessories designed for the device. The accessories include a couple of cooling fans and magnetic chargers that are also available for pre-order via the official Oppo online store in China. OnePlus has confirmed a Magnetic Ice Card Slim Cooler that measures 9.8mm thick and weighs just 68g. There’s also a 40W Super Freezing Point Magnetic cooler and a 50W AIRVOOC wireless charger with a stand. All of the accessories will be unveiled...
